name: Verizon Wireless
notes: Verizon uses a private home domain (vzims.com) and a private ePDG FQDN (wo.vzwwo.com), NOT the 3GPP discovery names (ims/epdg.epc.mnc480.mcc311.[pub.]3gppnetwork.org). Gm runs over a single persistent TCP connection (a >MTU INVITE is dropped on UDP through the tunnel). Ericsson MTAS: the SDP ANSWER arrives in the reliable 183 Session Progress (100rel/PRACK); the 200 OK comes back with Content-Length:0.
